title: Score a Minisforum Ryzen 5 or Ryzen 7 mini PC from $600 in Best Buy's big sale
summary: Triple display support via HDMI, DisplayPort, and USB4, dual 2.5G LAN, Wi-Fi 6E, and Bluetooth 5.3. Featuring OCuLink eGPU support, triple-display output, dual 2.5GbE LAN, Wi-Fi 6E, and USB4, it’s a versatile compact system for gaming and creative workloads.
